summary: UI cleanup pass for FPS Calculator - all requested features verified. Quality colors (Low=green, Medium=blue, High=purple, Ultra=orange) correctly applied to FPS cards, chart bars, and Compare page. Hardware names properly formatted with brand prefixes (Ryzen/Core/RTX/GTX/RX). Chart tooltips show full game names and aligned FPS values. Fixed mobile horizontal scroll issue caused by hero-glow overflow.

features_verified.chart_bar_colors: PASS - Bars change color when clicking quality toggles (Low=green, Medium=blue, High=purple, Ultra=orange)
features_verified.chart_tooltip_full_names: PASS - Tooltip shows full game names (Microsoft Flight Simulator, Baldur's Gate 3)
features_verified.chart_tooltip_hardware: PASS - Shows 'Ryzen 7 7800X3D + RTX 4090' with proper brand prefixes
features_verified.chart_unique_labels: PASS - Labels show unique identifiers like 'Fortnite (RTX 4090)' vs 'Fortnite (RTX 5090)'
features_verified.results_banner_formatted: PASS - Shows 'Results for Ryzen 7 7800X3D + RTX 4090' (brand prefixes stripped correctly)
features_verified.compare_page_quality_colors: PASS - Same quality colors applied consistently
features_verified.compare_head_to_head: PASS - Table displays with FPS diff and percentages
features_verified.mobile_responsive: PASS - Fixed horizontal scroll issue by adding overflow-x:hidden to body
features_verified.main_calculator_flow: PASS - End-to-end calculation flow works correctly

css_fix_applied.issue: hero-glow element (900px fixed width) caused horizontal scroll on mobile (390px viewport)
css_fix_applied.fix: Added overflow-x:hidden to body and max-width:100vw to .hero-glow

context_for_next_testing_agent: UI cleanup iteration complete. Quality colors now consistent: Performance=#00e5ff(cyan), Low=#22c55e(green), Medium=#60a5fa(blue), High=#a78bfa(purple), Ultra=#f59e0b(orange). Chart uses QUALITY_COLORS constant from lib/constants.js. formatCPU/formatGPU helpers strip brand prefixes. Mobile responsive with overflow-x:hidden on body. Made with Emergent watermark is platform-injected and cannot be removed.
